description: The MainTexturePropertyBlock component is a Material Property Block for the main texture of a component.

fields.Texture: Texture to swap out the main texture with.

usage: This component allows one to swap out what a material considers its main texture, such as the albedo texture, with the given ``Texture``. This property block only applies to materials that contain a ``_MainTex`` material property field. Notably, UnlitMaterial does not support this property block.
